Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Changes the name of the office of temporary and disability assistance to the office of economic security
Summary: Changes the name of the office of temporary and disability assistance to the office of economic security.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 436 of the laws of 1997 amending the social services law and other such law relating to enacting The Welfare Reform Act of 1997, in relation to changing the name of the office of temporary and disability assistance to the office of economic security
